aboutLocales.zh:
关于 CodexFlow

CodexFlow 诞生于一个简单的想法：让 Codex 的使用体验更流畅、更优雅。
aboutLocales.en:
About CodexFlow

CodexFlow began with a simple idea: make interacting with Codex smoother and more elegant.

latest.notes:
1. Worktree：深度集成 git worktree 流程、目录树与 Build/Run；支持非 Git 目录初始化；支持备注项目名与自动编号
2. 历史：支持分页加载与搜索高亮；左键跳转 IDE 具体行，右键复制路径；详情渲染性能提升
3. 监控：新增 Agent 工作回合计时面板与统计；YOLO 模式预设与临时开关；优化状态同步
4. 体验：项目搜索支持备注名；折叠目录“蓝点”活动提醒；增强键盘导航与弹窗交互；白屏自愈与 GPU 崩溃自动回退
5. 性能：大仓库 @ 搜索与索引优化，显著减少卡顿；补齐 CSP 安全头
6. 兼容：支持 Gemini 新目录结构；修复 Claude 命令行多行截断与 PowerShell 非 ASCII 参数

notesLocales.zh:
1. Worktree：深度集成 git worktree 流程、目录树与 Build/Run；支持非 Git 目录初始化；支持备注项目名与自动编号
2. 历史：支持分页加载与搜索高亮；左键跳转 IDE 具体行，右键复制路径；详情渲染性能提升
3. 监控：新增 Agent 工作回合计时面板与统计；YOLO 模式预设与临时开关；优化状态同步
4. 体验：项目搜索支持备注名；折叠目录“蓝点”活动提醒；增强键盘导航与弹窗交互；白屏自愈与 GPU 崩溃自动回退
5. 性能：大仓库 @ 搜索与索引优化，显著减少卡顿；补齐 CSP 安全头
6. 兼容：支持 Gemini 新目录结构；修复 Claude 命令行多行截断与 PowerShell 非 ASCII 参数
notesLocales.en:
1. Worktree: Deeply integrated git worktree workflow, directory tree, and Build/Run support. Added one-click Git initialization for non-Git folders. Supports project remark naming and automatic numbering.
2. History: Added pagination and search highlighting. Left-click to jump to IDE specific lines, right-click to copy paths. Improved detail rendering performance.
3. Monitoring: New Agent round timing panels and statistics. YOLO mode global presets and temporary toggles. Enhanced status synchronization.
4. UX: Search now supports directory remarks. "Blue dot" activity indicators for collapsed folders. Improved keyboard navigation and modal interactions. Added renderer self-healing and GPU crash fallback.
5. Performance: Optimized @ mention search and indexing for large repositories. Significantly reduced lag. Added CSP security headers.
6. Compatibility: Supports new Gemini directory structures. Fixed Claude multi-line truncation and PowerShell non-ASCII parameter issues.
